rulings.Case Title: EDWARD J CONNER VS. COUSINS/MYERS II, LLC et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 20, 2013, line 1. DEFENDANT HKS, INC.,INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA HKS ARCHITECTS, INC DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend as to the 3rd and 5th causes of action for Plaintiff to allege in good faith facts re: agency and duty to disclose. Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend as to the 4th cause of action. Gaggero v. County of San Diego (2004) 124 Cal.App.4th 609. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARSHA PENDERGRASS VS. HERBERT ALSTON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Motion To Quash
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 20, 2013, line 2. DEFENDANT HERBERT ALSTON Amended Notice Of Motion To Quash DENIED. Defendant was properly served pursuant to CCP 415.20(b). Plaintiff's request for sanctions is DENIED. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL et al VS. MIRIAM GOLDTEIN et al
